name: Bug Report

## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Skill/Agent Affected
Which skill or sub-agent is involved? (e.g., `/architecture`, `parallel-wa-reviewer`)

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Platform used (Claude Code CLI / Claude Projects / GitHub Copilot)
2. What you asked the agent
3. What happened vs. what you expected

## Expected Behavior
What should have happened?

## Additional Context
Paste relevant agent output or error messages (redact any sensitive info).
